title: Jubilant Hull City promoted to the Premier League
summary: Hull City secured Premier League promotion by defeating Middlesbrough 1-0 in the Championship playoff final at Wembley Stadium on Saturday.
content: Hull City have been promoted to the Premier League after a 1-0 win in the Championship playoff final against Middlesbrough on Saturday at Wembley Stadium.

zh.title: 赫尔城晋升英超
zh.summary: 赫尔城在周六温布利大球场英冠附加赛决赛中以1-0击败米德尔斯堡，确保了英超晋升资格。

title: Kane hat trick powers Bayern to German Cup title
summary: Harry Kane scored a hat trick as Bayern Munich won the German Cup final 3-0 over Stuttgart, claiming their 21st title and first since 2020. Kane's season tally reached 61 goals.
content: Harry Kane had a hat trick, improving his season tally to 61 goals, as Bayern Munich beat Stuttgart 3-0 in the German Cup final to lift the trophy for the 21st time and first since 2020.

zh.title: 凯恩帽子戏法助拜仁赢得德国杯
zh.summary: 哈里·凯恩梅开三度，拜仁慕尼黑在德国杯决赛中以3-0击败斯图加特，赢得了他们的第21个冠军，也是自2020年以来的首个。凯恩本赛季进球数达到61球。

title: Lewandowski scores in farewell as Barcelona lose
summary: Valencia defeated LaLiga champions Barcelona 3-1 in a come-from-behind victory on the final day of the season, with Robert Lewandowski scoring in what appeared to be his farewell.
content: Valencia scored twice in the space of five second-half minutes as they came from behind to beat LaLiga champions Barcelona 3-1, although it was not enough to earn them European qualification on the final day of the season.

zh.title: 莱万多夫斯基告别进球，巴塞罗那落败
zh.summary: 巴伦西亚在赛季最后一天以3-1逆转击败西甲冠军巴塞罗那，罗伯特·莱万多夫斯基进球，这似乎是他的告别之作。

title: Putellas on Barcelona future: 'You will see'
summary: Barcelona won the Women's Champions League for the fourth time with a 4-0 victory over OL Lyonnes, though midfielder Alexia Putellas remained noncommittal about her future with the club.
content: OSLO, Norway -- Alexia Putellas sidestepped questions about her future after helping Barcelona win the Women's Champions League on Saturday with a resounding 4-0 victory against OL Lyonnes at the Ullevaal Stadion.

zh.title: 普特埃拉斯谈巴塞罗那的未来："你会看到的"
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那以4:0的比分战胜里昂女足，第四次赢得女足欧冠冠军，但中场球员阿莱克西亚·普特埃拉斯对自己在俱乐部的未来保持了模棱两可的态度。

title: Sources: Reyna in as U.S. picks World Cup roster
summary: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino announced his 26-man World Cup roster, with midfielder Gio Reyna among those selected for the tournament.
content: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino has selected his 26-man roster for the upcoming World Cup, with Gio Reyna among those included, sources confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：美国队选定世界杯阵容，雷纳入选
zh.summary: 美国队主帅毛里西奥·波切蒂诺公布了26人世界杯大名单，中场球员吉奥·雷纳入选参加比赛。

title: Iran says WC camp moved to from U.S to Mexico
summary: Iran's soccer federation moved the national team's World Cup training base from the United States to Mexico following FIFA approval.
content: The president of the governing body of Iranian soccer said Saturday that the nation's World Cup training base has been moved to Mexico from the United States after getting approval from FIFA.

zh.title: 伊朗称世界杯营地从美国迁往墨西哥
zh.summary: 伊朗足球协会在获得国际足联批准后，将国家队的世界杯训练基地从美国迁至墨西哥。

title: Carvajal mourns 'end of an era' in Madrid farewell...
summary: Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal departed the club after playing his final match in a 4-2 victory over Athletic Club, describing it as the "end of a marvellous era."
content: Dani Carvajal said his departure marks the "end of a marvellous era" at Real Madrid after the defender played his last game for the club in a 4-2 win over Athletic Club.

zh.title: 卡瓦哈尔在马德里告别中为'时代终结'而哀悼
zh.summary: 皇马后卫丹尼·卡瓦哈尔在4-2战胜竞技队的最后一场比赛后离开俱乐部，称这是"一个美好时代的终结"。
